Name: PlayerMaterialPresetParam
Description:
Defines the Material options for Armored Cores.

Row ID links the Preset to the icon texture in SB_Material.dds and SB_Material.layout

Row ID + 210900 links the Preset to the FMG name it uses in the menu.

Fields.Name: Glow Level
Fields.Description: Even for the glossiness parameter, make sure to set the glow level to 1. Otherwise, the image will be completely black.

Fields.Name: Albedo Texture
Fields.Description: Reference ID for material replacement in coloring

Fields.Name: Normal/Shininess Texture
Fields.Description: Reference ID for material replacement in coloring
